overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic urban sidewalk. The character passes digital billboards, pedestrians, and commercial buildings in a sunlit downtown area with moderate traffic and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban sidewalk with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a red construction wall with large digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: two women walking ahead who then move aside as the character passes

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement showing a beverage cup on the red wall
tall red construction barrier running along the sidewalk
elevated highway structure with yellow support beams spanning the street ahead
tall modern skyscrapers with glass facades lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a futuristic city sidewalk bordered by a red construction wall with digital billboards on the left and a busy multi-lane street on the right. The scene features modern glass towers in the distance and an elevated highway overpass ahead, with sparse pedestrian traffic moving in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban sidewalk with clear view of distant skyline

events.description: character passes a child pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing a small child wearing a cap and casual clothing

notable_agents.action: child pedestrian walking past the character on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall blue street light pole along the curb

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk opens up to reveal more sky as the character continues past the digital billboards. A child pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction around the 18-second mark. The red construction wall continues on the left while the highway overpass draws closer, and a street light pole appears along the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial storefront with neon signage and outdoor seating

events.description: red construction wall ends and commercial building with overhang begins
walking past a parked red sports car along the curb

agents.ego_description: walking past a parked sports car and a commercial building with patrons seated outside

notable_agents.action: people sitting on outdoor benches outside the commercial establishment

entered.detail: sleek red sports car parked along the street curb
low-rise commercial building with large neon sign featuring a woman's face
concrete bench with seated NPCs outside the establishment
illuminated billboard with female portrait and text on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The red construction wall gives way to a commercial building with an overhanging roof that provides partial shade. The character passes a parked red sports car around 35 seconds and continues along the storefront which features prominent neon signage and outdoor seating where NPCs are gathered. The lighting becomes mixed as the character moves under the building overhang.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic urban sidewalk that transitions from an open, sunlit street into the shaded corridor of a commercial district. It begins with the character walking beside a red construction wall and digital billboards, moving toward a distant elevated highway overpass under a bright sky. As the path opens further, the camera passes a child pedestrian and a street light pole while the highway structure looms closer. The scene then shifts as the construction wall gives way to a commercial building, moving the character under an overhanging roof that casts partial shade over the walkway. Finally, the camera glides past a parked red sports car and neon-lit storefronts where pedestrians gather in outdoor seating areas.
